{{Quote|Buy? Buy! Oh, come, sir, and see-see-see! Any pet worth having is to be had at Sabodor's, best in the Sector.|Sabodor|<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End">''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''</ref>}}
'''Sabodor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rakririan]], one of the few to leave his homeworld of [[Rakrir]].

==Biography==
Sabodor settled on [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]] where he established [[Sabodor's/Legends|Sabodor's]], an exotic pet-store. He catered to the rich upper class of Etti IV, who desired his acquisitions as a means of showing off their wealth. Of the numerous pet-stores, his was considered the best.

Sabodor sold a [[Dinko (creature)|dinko]] to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] who planned to use it to repay [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]], but only after declining to purchase [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], initially believing Solo intended to sell the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]].

==Behind the scenes==
Sabodor was incorrectly spelled "Sabador" in both the ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' and in ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''.
